title: I Tried These Magnetic Breathing Strips, and I've Never Felt More Well-Rested
summary: So when a friend recommended I try nasal strips, I figured it was worth a try. On the sleep side, research indicates that external nasal strips do not significantly improve subjective measures of sleep quality and nasal congestion compared with placebo strips.
caption: output/2026-07-20/i-tried-these-magnetic-breathing-strips-and-i-ve-never-felt-more-well-.txt
